scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev -w frontend" "npm run start:dev -w backend"
scripts.dev:all: concurrently -n fe,be,ngrok -c blue,green,magenta "npm run dev -w frontend" "npm run start:dev -w backend" "node scripts/ngrok.mjs"
scripts.build: npm run build -w frontend && npm run build -w backend
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w frontend && npm run lint -w backend
